free_text: MASS DISTRIBUTIONS IN MONOENERGETIC NEUTRON INDUCED
FISSION OF TH-232
ARGONNE FAST NEUTRON GENERATOR FACILITY
PROTONS ON LITHIUM FOR NEUTRONS BELOW 5-MEV
DEUTERONS ON DEUTERIUM FOR NEUTRONS ABOVE 5-MEV
THORIUM SAMPLE, 2.54-CM DIAMETER BY 0.0254-CM THICK
WITH AVERAGE MASS OF 1.3-GMS.
U-238 MONITOR USED TO PROVIDE APPROXIMATE FISSION RATE.
FISSION YIELDS PLACED ON ABSOLUTE SCALE BY
NORMALIZATION OF COMPLETE MASS DISTRIBUTION TO
200-PERCENT TOTAL YIELD.
THERMAL INDUCED NEUTRON FISSION OF U-235 USED TO CHECK
GAMMA INTENSITIES OF DECAY DATA
UNCERTAINTIES IN FISSION YIELDS INCLUDE ALL KNOWN
SOURCES OF SYSTEMATIC ERROR. TWO PERCENT UNCERTAINTY
IN THE FISSION RATE OBTAINED FROM THE NORMALIZATION
PROCEDURE.
APPROVED BY L.E.GLENDENIN 81/3/26.
DECAY DATA MOVED TO SAN=2.
BIB UPDATE
CHEMICAL SEPERATION FOLLOWED BY BETA COUNTING
COMPUTER PROGRAM CLSQ USED TO OBTAIN ACTIVITIES.
LOW MASS FISSION CHAMBER WITH THIN STANDARDIZED
DEPOSIT OF U-238 TO MONITOR FISSION RATE
CALIBRATED LOW BACKGROUND BETA PROPORTIONAL
COUNTER WITH AUTOMATIC SAMPLE CHANGER.
DECAY DATA FOR BETA EMITTERS TAKEN BY COMPILER FROM
CHART OF THE NUCLIDES.
CORRECTIONS MADE FOR CONTRIBUTIONS TO FISSION RATE FROM
OFF-ENERGY NEUTRONS FROM P-LI SOURCE REACTION,
NEUTRONS FROM DEUTERON STRIPPING REACTIONS, AND
INELASTIC AND ELASTIC SCATTERING BY THE ROOM
ENVIROMENT. THESE CORRECTIONS RANGE FROM 1 TO 8% FOR
MASSES 103 TO 127.
NO CORRECTION MADE FOR POSSIBLE CHARGE DISTRIBUTION
EFFECTS.
DECAY DATA MOVED FROM SAN=1.
DATA SPLIT INTO 2 SETS BY METHOD, RESORTED
CALCULATED FROM YIELDS USING CONSERVATION OF MASS
HIGH RESOLUTION GAMMA-RAY SPECTROSCOPY.
COMPUTER PROGRAM GAMANAL USED TO OBTAIN INTENSITIES OF
RESOLVED PHOTOPEAKS FROM GAMMA-RAY SPECTRA.
80-CM**3 LITHIUM DRIFTED GERMANIUM DETECTOR
CORRECTIONS TO GAMMA MEASUREMENTS INCLUDE COUNTING
EFFICIENCY, CASCADE COINCIDENCE LOSSES, ABSOLUTE GAMMA
EMISSION INTENSITIES, GENETIC RELATIONSHIPS, AND
DEGREE OF SATURATION DURING IRRADIATION.
NO CORRECTION MADE FOR POSSIBLE CHARGE DISTRIBUTION
EFFECTS.
